name: Dice & Sword
short_description: DICE & SWORD is a board game base RPG developed by a solo-indie base in Hong Kong. Let roll the dice to start your adventure!
detailed_description:
DICE & SWORD is a board game base RPG. You can roll the dice and start the story!

Features:

  • Rolling the dice to move and fight the enemies.

  • Turn-based combat that you can attack, defend or flee with the Dice!

  • Beat the enemies to get the items for sell or craft new equipment.

  • Some place can build towers to help you fight enemies.

  • Level-up improves your abilities and unlocks new skills.

  • 6 chapters of story + ???

  • 30+ Usable characters.

  • 100+ Different enemies.

  • 200+ Items or equipment.

  • 100+ different skills.

  • All game elements are done by one person. No Assest or AI.
